reviews.review_description:
When you load the demo, you sit on a desk.  It that it is. No explanation what to do. 
You can change your settings there.
But how to start the game?

I love playing scape room games. This one is realy nice. The graphics are  fantastic, dark and mystreious. The puzzles are fun and smooth. I am excited to have the full version. I recommended this to everyone.

Much of VR truly bores me, but to my surprise this game (even as a demo) offers a fresh approach to VR Game play. I was completely immersed (not because of the graphics- while they are good) but because the puzzles kept my mind occupied and I was fully in the game. As you develop this further the only thing I would add is a sense of urgency as some point. I would have enjoyed some more stress in feeling like I needed to figure this out in time "or else". Please give us the "or else" element and complete the project. FANTASTIC
Reminds me of many an escape room experience in a room exquisitely similar to this. I couldn't really latch on to anything here and get going on the mystery, so I just messed around.
I enjoyed the demo. I needed more space to move around than l had. I found to enjoy the game you need to stand. I will buy the game and recommend it to others when it's  completed.

reviews.review_title: I want a Full Version NOW!
reviews.review_description:
Can't wait for a full version to come out. Graphically fantastic great atmosphere!

When will the full version be released?

reviews.review_title: Wow , what a start, it's fabulous
reviews.review_description: Omgosh wish there was more now, reminds me of the Room a dark matter, and this demo was amazing. Loved it, great puzzles with cool mechanical effects . Please complete ASAP, it's a must have, great job so far.

Tried the demo and it has me wanting more.  The graphics are great.  The puzzle mechanics are fantastic, very interesting, clever and intriguing.  The one hallway where you go downstairs I was anticipating a jump scare and almost didn't want to go down, but thankfully no jump, thank you for that, lol.  Looking forward to the full game and more great mechanical puzzles, someone did great work creating those.  Is there an estimated release date?  Can't wait.

If you like The Room or The Atlas Mystery, you’ll definitely love this. I’m upset that I came across this game so soon. As they just released the Demo. Now I have to sit around and wait for the full game. But I definitely will be waiting! :)

I mean, is this just a tease, like a forever tease? I don’t wanna follow some dumb discord I just don’t want to have to sign up for anything else at this point I’d be happy with emails stating when anything is happening or SOME kind of update? 
This game looks like it’s going to be off the hook, and worth good money.
